creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The worst way to start your Copenhagen trip ❌

You can get from Copenhagen Airport to the city centre by train, bus and metro - the price is the same no matter what mode of transport you’re travelling on and you can either buy a paper ticket or use an app called “DOT Tickets” ✌️

So don’t make visiting Denmark even more expensive than it actually is 🤠

I’ve got a whole video about getting from CPH Airport to the city centre over on my Youtube-channel - just search for Destination Well Known or use the link in my profile 🤝 

#copenhagen #denmarktravel #cphairport #traveltips

transcription.text: Don't make this tourist mistake when you're coming to Copenhagen. As you know, Copenhagen and Denmark is an expensive place. So when you land in Copenhagen airport, don't just walk out and take a taxi. They are extremely expensive and it's actually way faster just to walk the 100 meters up to the metro station and get the metro. That way you'll only pay 30 kroner and you'll be in the city center in just 13 minutes.
